name: golang-k8s-klog-dev
title: golang-k8s-klog-dev
description:
leveled execution logs for Go (library)
klog is a permanent fork of https://github.com/golang/glog. The decision to
create klog was one that wasn't made lightly, but it was necessary due to some
drawbacks that are present in glog. Ultimately, the fork was created due to
glog not being under active development.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-k8s-klog-dev because leveled execution logs for Go (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-k8s-klog-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-k8s-klog-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-k8s-klog-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
